channel.title: RSS reader not yet whitelisted!
channel.description: RSS reader not yet whitelist! Please send an email rss [AT] xcancel [DOT] com with this ID to get your RSS feed reader whitelisted: 2c5473bec4e89a7c7f2e32744d4fb102436f8ee2f2d96646a0a7b4af858740845581d4f44b960eb67cfb51223e3abf807d2649f45162ab6dc3befef43896c212b8bfdd65f7045f870b8abde740688a93729c7866526d84045f63d1ba71817b8258dcab6d647ca7c2cbf63618c75b82bb562a2b18757308604b808e16e6c4aa70

item.title: RSS reader not yet whitelisted!
item.dc:creator: @xcancel
item.description: RSS reader not yet whitelist! Plain request with just the ID will be ignored! Please send an email rss [AT] xcancel [DOT] com with the reason why you want your RSS feed reader to be whitelist and this ID: 2c5473bec4e89a7c7f2e32744d4fb102436f8ee2f2d96646a0a7b4af858740845581d4f44b960eb67cfb51223e3abf807d2649f45162ab6dc3befef43896c212b8bfdd65f7045f870b8abde740688a93729c7866526d84045f63d1ba71817b8258dcab6d647ca7c2cbf63618c75b82bb562a2b18757308604b808e16e6c4aa70
